title: Create durable packets for AMP263 through AMP265
persona: Planning, operations, strategy, risk, and executive reviewers
steps: Open each AMP263-AMP265 workspace from the generated Assistant subnav.
Review live source signals, risks, recommendations, artifact, approval route, and rollback controls.
expected: Each workspace persists an AssistantAdvancedProgramPacket row with ampNumber 263, 264, or 265 and the correct programKey.
The packets have domain-specific source labels for demand, supply, constraints, scenario risk, finance, evidence, and action pressure.
Demand plans, supply plans, pricing signals, capacity allocations, optimization decisions, scenario assumptions, and planning records are not mutated automatically.

title: Queue review for sensing, constraint, and scenario packets
steps: Create or select a DRAFT packet.
Add a review note describing the downstream decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and records actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
AssistantActionQueueItem uses an AMP-specific actionKind such as assistant_amp263_review, assistant_amp264_review, or assistant_amp265_review.
AssistantAuditEvent states that downstream records were not changed automatically.

title: Autonomous sensing, constraint solving, and scenario promotion remain review-only
steps: Open a packet with active risks.
Inspect recommendationJson, approvalPlanJson, artifactJson, and rollbackPlanJson.
Queue review without executing downstream changes.
expected: recommendationJson requires human approval before demand, supply, pricing, constraint, allocation, or scenario-promotion changes.
approvalPlanJson identifies planning, risk, commercial, operations, strategy, or executive owners.
rollbackPlanJson preserves source records and asks for a fresh packet when source evidence changes materially.
Autonomous sensing and optimization recommendations do not self-execute or silently expand automation.
